requirement: Generate high lateral and combined acceleration capability.
acceptance_basis: Baseline GGV, StandardSim lateral limit, and sensitivity-ranked architecture levers are documented.
primary_evidence: GGV report, SteadyStateEval report, EnvelopeSens tornadoes, StandardSens tornadoes.
current_read: Satisfied as a simulation design basis; requires ISO 4138 slow-ramp correlation.

acceptance_basis: Understeer, sideslip, YMD trim behavior, and transient phase/lag are read together.
primary_evidence: YMD report, SteadyStateEval report, TransientEval report, StandardSens Pearson table.
current_read: Satisfied as a model read; track validation must check driver confidence and recovery behavior.

acceptance_basis: Tornado and refined-surface results identify controllable inputs with meaningful response authority.
primary_evidence: StandardSens report, refined response-surface selected parameters and results.
current_read: Satisfied for camber, rear bar, aero/load, mass/CG, and roll-platform knobs.

requirement: Separate architecture decisions from trackside trim.
acceptance_basis: Architecture levers are evaluated in EnvelopeSens; setup levers are evaluated in StandardSens.
primary_evidence: EnvelopeSens report, StandardSens report, design decision matrix.
current_read: Satisfied; notebook explicitly prevents toe/spring/bar tuning from masquerading as architecture.

requirement: Keep the design defensible under review.
acceptance_basis: Every major claim maps to a report, CSV, metric, assumption, and validation method.
primary_evidence: Evidence index, generated output tables, regeneration commands.
current_read: Satisfied for simulation evidence; physical validation remains the open final gate.
